project.name: Cascada Library - Spark + Delta executor
project.description:
The production SparkQueryExecutorPort adapter: builds a Spark 3.5.x SparkSession (local or Kubernetes — identical code, only config differs) with Delta Lake extensions, runs physical SQL over Delta tables, and maps the Spark Row result into the cache's framework-free ResultFrame. Ported from data_collector/src/core/spark/spark_manager.py + cluster-deployment/spark_configs.py.
Spark 3.5.6 officially supports Java 8/11/17 (not 21); the cluster image (Spark 3.5.6 + Gluten + Velox + Delta) supplies the Spark/Delta runtime, so those dependencies are `provided` here — this module compiles against them and contributes the adapter + the pure, fully-tested config builder.
